zh.lifeSummary: 當Mór Ní Tuathail於1114年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達卡斯特萊德爾莫特時，她的父親Murcertac O Toole35歲，母親Cacht Ní Morda25歲。她於1140年與Diarmait Mac Murchada在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1191年5月10日在愛爾蘭萊音斯特享年77歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mór Ní Tuathail于1114年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達卡斯特萊德爾莫特时，她的父亲Murcertac O Toole35岁，母亲Cacht Ní Morda25岁。她于1140年与Diarmait Mac Murchada在爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1191年5月10日在爱尔兰萊音斯特享年77岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙姆爾特。

nameMeanings.name: Ní
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Pei-Lin, Kong, Min, Ming, Yung, Bin, Cao, Huang, Jing, Wen, Zhen, Biao, Chang, Chi, Quan, Yaping.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 倪, meaning ‘boundary’ or ‘infants’ in ancient Chinese: adopted in order to escape from a feud in place of the Chinese surname 郳, which is also pronounced Ni. The original surname was from Ni (郳), the name of an ancient state, also called Little Zhu (located in Shandong province), granted to the son of Duke Wu of Zhu (ruler of the state of Zhu, died 796  BC ). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 賴, see   Lai   1.

variants.name: Lai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ching, Kwok, Ming, Wing, Wai, Wen, Chi, Chun, Ho, Kam, Man, Yee.  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Tuan, Hoa, Ky, Lan, Thang, Tien, Trang, Tu, Yen, Anh.

Chinese: Mandarin or Cantonese form of the surname 賴, meaning ‘depend on’ in Chinese: from Lai (賴), the name of a state (located in Henan province), which was annexed by the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 來, meaning ‘to come’ in Chinese: (i) simplified form of the placename Lai (郲), the name of a fief (located in Henan province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) adopted in place of the Chinese surname Lai (萊) which originated from the name of a fief/state. After its annihilation by the state of Qi, people simplified the name as 萊 in order to escape from political persecutions.

variants.name: Ny
meanings: Swedish: ornamental or soldier's name from ny ‘new’. It may sometimes derive from a placename beginning with Ny-.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 倪 (see   Ni  ) or 聶 (see   Nie   2).

nameMeanings.name: Tuathail
meanings: Irish: pronounced Tua-hal. An old Irish name, signifying 'a man possessed of a large landed property' or 'a lordship,' from tuatha, territories. Annals of Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Mór
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Mór Ní Tuathail was born in 1114, in Castledermot, County Kildare, Ireland, her father, Murcertac O Toole, was 35 and her mother, Cacht Ní Morda, was 25. She married Diarmait Mac Murchada in 1140, in Lough, County Wexford, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 10 May 1191, in Leinster, Ireland, at the age of 77, and was buried in Tintern, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mór Ní Tuathail est née en 1114, à Castledermot, County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Murcertac O Toole, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Cacht Ní Morda, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Diarmait Mac Murchada en 1140, à Lough, County Wexford, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 mai 1191, à Leinster, Irlande, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Tintern, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mór Ní Tuathail 1114 in Castledermot, County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Murcertac O Toole 35 und ihre Mutter Cacht Ní Morda 25. Sie hat 1140 in Lough, County Wexford, Irland Diarmait Mac Murchada geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. Mai 1191 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Leinster, Irland und wurde in Tintern, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mór Ní Tuathail è nata il nel 1114 nel Castledermot, County Kildare, Irlanda, sua padre, Murcertac O Toole, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Cacht Ní Morda, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Diarmait Mac Murchada nel 1140, nel Lough, County Wexford, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 maggio 1191, nel Leinster, Irlanda, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Tintern, Monmouthshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Mór Ní Tuathailが1114年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアカストレデルモトで生まれた時，父Murcertac O Tooleは35歳，母Cacht Ní Mordaは25歳であった。1140年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードロウでDiarmait Mac Murchadaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1191年5月10日にアイルランドレインスターで77歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアティンテルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mór Ní Tuathail(이)가 1114년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 카스틀레더모트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Murcertac O Toole(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cacht Ní Morda(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1140년 아일랜드 카운티 w스퍼드 루그h에서 Diarmait Mac Murchada(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1191년 5월 10일 아일랜드 레인스터에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 틴터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mór Ní Tuathail nasceu em 1114, em Castledermot, County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Murcertac O Toole, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Cacht Ní Morda, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Diarmait Mac Murchada em 1140, em Lough, County Wexford, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de maio de 1191, em Leinster, Irlanda, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Tintern, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mór Ní Tuathail родилась в 1114 г. в местности кастледирмот, коунти каилдар, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Murcertac O Toole было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Cacht Ní Morda, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Diarmait Mac Murchada в 1140 г. в местности лоую, коунти вексфорд, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 мая 1191 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности тинтирн, монмоутшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mór Ní Tuathail nació en 1114, en Castledermot, County Kildare, Irlanda, su papá, Murcertac O Toole, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Cacht Ní Morda, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Diarmait Mac Murchada en 1140, en Lough, County Wexford, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1191, en Leinster, Irlanda, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Tintern, Monmouthshire, Gales.
